## How to test

- [ ] npm install if dependencies are missing
- [ ] npm run build passes
- [ ] Vercel preview opens
- [ ] Homepage text is readable
- [ ] Navigation tabs work
- [ ] Event Finder works
- [ ] Event Library works
- [ ] Event filters work
- [ ] My Plan works
- [ ] Copy Plan works
- [ ] Download Plan works
- [ ] Mobile view checked
- [ ] Buttons/cards show pointer cursor where clickable

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Active app file checked through src/main.jsx
- [ ] Active app file edited
- [ ] No private student data added
- [ ] Existing event data preserved
- [ ] No backend added
- [ ] No login/auth added
- [ ] Static and Vercel-compatible
- [ ] No fake usage numbers added
